case.title: SEVEN-UP CO. v. FEDERAL TRADE COMMISSION

opinion.h: SEVEN-UP CO. v. FEDERAL TRADE COMMISSION , 414 U.S. 1013 (1973)
The SEVEN-UP COMPANY, petitioner, v. FEDERAL TRADE COMMISSION et al. No. 73-337.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Court of Appeals for the Eighth Circuit.
Mr. Justice STEWART took no part in the consideration or decision of this petition.[ Seven-Up Co. v. Federal Trade Commission 414 U.S. 1013 (1973) ]
